final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial portrait photo, cinematic still
Primary request: retro film-style street portrait of a young woman leaning against a neon sign on a Hong Kong street at night, 1990s era
Scene/backdrop: 1990s Hong Kong street at night, hazy neon-lit alley, blurred storefronts with Chinese signage in background
Subject: young woman in a denim jacket, leaning casually against a glowing neon sign, relaxed and nostalgic expression
Style/medium: 35mm analog film photography, vintage grain, retro cinematic
Composition/framing: medium shot, slight low-angle, shallow depth of field, subject centered against neon glow
Lighting/mood: warm neon ambient light, soft haze and lens bloom, moody and melancholic, nostalgic atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber and orange tones, faded reds and yellows from neon signs, muted shadows with slight green cast
Materials/textures: heavy film grain, faded color saturation, slight vignette, halation around light sources, worn denim texture
Constraints: no modern elements, no smartphones, keep 1990s Hong Kong aesthetic throughout
Avoid: clean digital sharpness, cold blue tones, over-exposed highlights, watermark
